findings.message:
The following file(s) appear to be third-party libraries. Please link to their sources and ensure each bundled copy is identical to the linked version (a VENDOR file at the add-on root is common practice).
Example: https://webextension-api.thunderbird.net/en/mv3/guides/innerHTML.html#safely-sanitizing-external-markup-with-dompurify
Read more: https://extensionworkshop.com/documentation/publish/third-party-library-usage/.
